professor.name: 金福生
professor.title: Associate Professor
professor.biography_text: JIN Fusheng received his Ph.D. degree in Computer Science at Beijing Institute of Technology. Now, he is an associate professor in School of Software of Beijing Institute of Technology, the vice deputy director of 'IBM-BIT big data analyzing center'. As visiting scholar, he visited to Bristol in UK in the year of 2007.
